patch.value: CodeFactor/Complexity: decompose runUpdate, the update mutate apply-callback, and register-mutation MCP arrows

Follow-up to pm-g7vl. Reduce the remaining item-mutation Complex Methods to <=17: runUpdate (CC 77) and the nested mutate apply-callback (CC 148) in src/cli/commands/update.ts, and the 6 shared register-mutation.ts arrows (CC 18-28). Behavior-preserving extraction; prune suppressions; 100% coverage; contracts/full.json byte-identical. Prefer extracting shared create/update field-resolution helpers into a common module to also cut duplication.
